expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus (“canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios”) and details Phase 4b requirements including canonical taxonomy and “Preserve scenario granularity (anti-compression)”. It notes inability to verify on artifacts, but the focus itself is explicitly covered.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4b
expectations.evidence: result.md is structured as a Phase 4b contract evaluation: it labels “Primary phase under test: Phase 4b”, enumerates “What Phase 4b is contractually required to do”, and discusses Phase 4b-specific inputs/outputs (4a draft to 4b draft). Although it cannot confirm actual 4b artifacts, the produced evaluation output aligns to the Phase 4b framing and requirements.
